about.title: Developer & Designer
about.bio: Freelance web developer based in Ottawa, Canada. I craft premium digital experiences for businesses across Canada and internationally.
about.bio2: With a strong focus on modern web technologies and thoughtful design, I help businesses build powerful digital products that drive results.

cta_banner.title: Ready to build something amazing?

services.title: What I Offer
services.subtitle: Premium solutions for ambitious digital projects
services.enterprise_desc: Design and development of advanced technology solutions for large organizations: MCP architecture, enterprise AI integration, commercial proposal and live demo.
services.s1_desc: Fully custom, responsive websites built to reflect your brand and achieve your goals.
services.s2_desc: Installable web apps that work offline and deliver a seamless native mobile experience.
services.s3_desc: Logo design, color palettes and typography — a cohesive and memorable visual identity.
services.s4_desc: Complex platform development with multi-role management, dashboards and advanced business logic.
services.s5_desc: End-to-end delivery and ordering solutions: customer app, vendor interface, order tracking and admin panel.
services.s6_desc: AI model integration (Claude, OpenAI) into your applications to automate, analyze and innovate.
services.s7_desc: Online booking and appointment systems with notifications and management dashboard.
services.s8_desc: SaaS application development with authentication, subscription management and scalable architecture.
services.s9_desc: Ongoing monitoring, updates, bug fixes and performance optimization for your applications.
